description: Fetch Baidu hot-search rankings. Supports realtime, homepage, novel, movie, and teleplay boards. Returns ranked items with title, heat index, description, tag, cover image, search link, and trend. No authentication required.

parameters.name: tab
parameters.description: Board type. Allowed values: realtime (default, 50 items), homepage (15 items), novel (30 items), movie (10 items), teleplay (10 items).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.
